holdings.infoBox: WSGE is an equity ETF with a total of 146 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Warren Street Global Equity ETF (WSGE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund provides exposure to the broad, global equity market through active management. It employs two strategies, combining core allocation with strategic factor-based allocation WSGE was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Warren.
